segments.speaker: 题目19/20
segments.text: Listen to an announcement in a classroom. I've noticed that some of you bring food to class. I understand that this is the 1st class of the day, and you may not have time to finish your breakfast at home. I don't mind if you eat in class. If that's what it takes to keep you alert, I just ask that you clean up after yourselves. Facilities has alerted me that this room is often a mess at the end of the day, so please your part to keep it tidy.
